name: Expense search, filters & pagination
description: Completed fullstack expense querying improvements for the feed. Backend extends GET /api/v1/expenses with validated filters for note search (`query`), amount_min/amount_max, group_id, category_key, payer_id, creator_id, visibility, date range, sort, limit, and sort-aware cursor pagination; adds GET /api/v1/expenses/summary for filtered totals using the same effective filter set as the list endpoint; and preserves server-side visibility plus household membership enforcement. Frontend adds page-local query, visibility, and category filters wired into both the feed list and a summary card, plus typed query hooks/client support aligned to the backend summary contract. Analytics charts and broader budgeting remain out of scope.
evidence: Verified with PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH" ./init.sh (pnpm install OK, harness checks OK, linting OK, type checking OK, running tests OK). Post-review regression coverage also passed with PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH" pnpm --filter worker test -- --runInBand "test/integration/expenses-summary.spec.ts" "test/integration/expenses-list.spec.ts" and PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH" pnpm --filter web test -- --runInBand "src/components/expense/expense-feed-summary.test.tsx" "src/components/expense/expense-feed-list.test.tsx" "src/views/app/expenses-page.test.tsx".
